cfo_execution_controller_n8n_nodes.description: n8n node configurations for CFO Execution Controller — Cross-agent financial integration

nodes.purpose: Listens for HTTP POST from Gemini Agent Bridge with cmo_spend, architect_risk, campaign_list

error_handling.missing_fields: 400 — CFO Agent: Missing data from CMO or Architect. Cannot calculate Fragility Index.

nodes.node_name: CFO Controller — Request from CMO Agent
nodes.purpose: Fetches CMO spend and campaign data from CMO Agent (Port 5020)

nodes.node_name: CFO Controller — Request from Master Architect
nodes.purpose: Fetches risk scores from Master Architect Elite (Port 5050)
Posts CFO report completion to War Room via Factory API

body.message: CFO Agent has deployed the Fragility Report to the AI Folder. Access here: {{ $json.drive_link }}

execution_flow: 1. Webhook receives POST with cmo_spend + architect_risk + campaign_list
2. Gatekeeper validates all 3 fields present → 400 if missing
3. Python node calculates: Fragility Index, Campaign ROI/NPV, Spend Reconciliation
4. Excel report generated with 4 tabs: Dashboard, Calculation Engine, Input Data, Campaign Analysis
5. Google Drive uploads to AI FOLDERS
6. Response sent to War Room: 'CFO Agent has deployed the Fragility Report to the AI Folder. Access here: [Link]'
